generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary motor encoder for the vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, measuring angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTopic
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary (gearbox) encoder measuring angular position of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTopic
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electric current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for torque estimation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTopic
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models and Data
instance IMTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of motor current (I_M) recorded over time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance RMTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of motor encoder raw values (r_M) over time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance RGTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of gearbox encoder raw values (r_G) over time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance RoutTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of output port speed (r_out) aggregated from motor and gearbox data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ) calculated from current and back‑EMF."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) of motor from encoder rates."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the motor including electrical and mechanical dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used in motor dynamics simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for improved low‑speed modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model capturing stick‑slip behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre dynamic friction model integrated into Simulink simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

instance StructuralSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML model of the vertical axis, defining components and connections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles real‑time MQTT ingestion of sensor topic streams for the DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTIngestionService
]

instance SimulinkEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes Simulink models for motor and gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorGearboxSimulationService,
                       ContinuousModelUpdateService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes aggregated sensor data and performs real‑time identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                       DifferentialAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renders dashboards and visualizations for operator interaction."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MQTTIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT ingestion service receiving real‑time sensor data from the physical robot."
    DTDFVocab:provides MQTTDataIngestionInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of joint friction using white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight,
                       MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance ContinuousModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous updating of simulation model parameters based on runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight,
                       ModelParameterUpdateAction
]

instance MotorGearboxSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates motor and gearbox dynamics using Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance DifferentialAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Differential analysis between simulated and measured torque/velocity for control refinement."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlGainsTuningInsight,
                       ControlGainsTuningAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides rich visualization and dashboards for data monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionalAccuracyImprovementInsight,
                       PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance MQTTDataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ingestion of real‑time sensor data via MQTT."
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss components and their impact on motor performance."
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inference of updated friction model parameters for improved simulation accuracy."
]

instance ControlGainsTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for refined motion control gains based on dynamic analysis."
]

instance PositionalAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data‑driven decisions to enhance positional accuracy of the robot axis."
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Execution of motor and gearbox Simulink simulations within the DT."
]

// C17: Actions
instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommend maintenance to address detected friction anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated update of friction model parameters in Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlGainsTuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic tuning of motion control gains based on analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters to improve positional accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data acquisition and processing occur in real time at millisecond granularity; simulation models run synchronously with sensor updates, enabling continuous friction model refinement"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Operational architecture consisting of AAS asset representation, engineering and simulation models, a processing component that consumes sensor data, runs friction and dynamics simulations, aggregates data traces, and feeds the results to a dashboard UI via MQTT"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "(1) Design – problem definition and requirement capture; (2) Development – asset analysis, model creation, and simulation; (3) Implementation – building and executing the digital shadow and dashboard; (4) Operation – continuous data acquisition, model refinement, and feedback to the controller; covers the manufactured (physical robot) and operated (runtime) phases"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of data traces to their source sensors and simulation steps; use of white‑box analytical models with verified parameters; continuous validation against measured torque and velocity; cross‑validation between simulated and real data; model uncertainty quantification and parameter re‑identification when drift is observed"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensors stream data to the digital shadow via MQTT (publish/subscribe). Asset Administration Shells expose asset metadata and model references. One‑way data flow from physical system to digital shadow (no feedback). Communication assumed to run over a TCP/IP corporate network; no additional protocols are specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards and formal tools explicitly used: SysML (for system modelling), MathWorks MATLAB Simulink (for simulation), MQTT (for messaging), and Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset metadata; no ISO/IEC standard numbers are referenced in the documents."
]
